title: Colville General Store at sunset with rainbow
creator: Larisa Webb
description: The Colville General Store lit by low evening sun, with a rainbow arcing over the hills behind and a dark storm sky above. The painted sun mural and the Colville General Store sign sit above the veranda, with the fuel pumps, benches and community noticeboard out the front.
subject: Colville General Store;Colville;general store;rainbow;sunset
image_alt_text: The Colville General Store at sunset, a red weatherboard shop with a colourful painted sun mural, a rainbow over the hills behind and dark cloud above.
notes: Permission to use granted by photographer. File in /assets/img/collection/ (same image as assets/img/001.jpeg). Coordinates approximate to Colville township. Confirm formal rights statement or licence.

title: Sunset over the islands from Amodeo Bay
creator: Anne Mountjoy
description: A calm sea at sunset seen from Amodeo Bay through coastal shrubs, with a line of islands low on the horizon and a band of orange light beneath heavy grey cloud.
subject: coastline;sunset;islands;sea;Amodeo Bay;northern Coromandel
image_alt_text: A calm sea at sunset with a chain of islands silhouetted on the horizon, framed by dark coastal shrubs.
notes: Taken at Amodeo Bay (location confirmed by photographer). Confirm which islands are shown if you want them named.

title: Dusk over the sea from Amodeo Bay
creator: Anne Mountjoy
description: Still water at dusk at Amodeo Bay, with a rocky shore and pampas grass in the foreground and a long mountainous landmass stretching across the horizon under a soft orange and grey sky.
subject: coastline;dusk;sea;landscape;Amodeo Bay;northern Coromandel
image_alt_text: A still sea at dusk with pampas grass and a rocky beach in front and a mountainous landmass along the horizon.
notes: Taken at Amodeo Bay (location confirmed by photographer). The mountainous landmass across the water is not yet identified, confirm if you want it named.
